title: Tatakan Heat Wave
lead: Tatakan is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.46. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, posing a significant threat to its residents.
body:
The current heat wave in Tatakan has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating a severe anomaly. 
 The city's weather conditions are characterized by high temperatures, with a CDD of 11.1 GG, and relatively low wind speed of 4.2 km/h. 
 The humidity level is at 65%, which can exacerbate the heat-related issues, and the HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no cooling degree days.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to protect residents and infrastructure.
